channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tim Merlier claims Tour de France stage victory in Bordeaux sprint
item.description: Belgian cyclist Tim Merlier secured the seventh stage of the 113th Tour de France with a dominant sprint finish in Bordeaux, marking his second stage win of the race. The 175km route from Hagetmau to ...

item.title: Tanzania government supports youth entrepreneurship with 200 billion shilling loan program
item.description: The Tanzanian government has started distributing loans from its 200 billion shilling Youth Development Fund, with Arusha receiving 730 million shillings in the first phase. This initiative aims to ta...

item.title: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bot access with detailed instructions
item.description: The text provided appears to be a message from News Corp Australia regarding access restrictions for crawler bots. It explains that automated systems manage bot traffic on their websites and outlines ...

item.title: UK Heatwave Sparks Widespread Hosepipe Ban as Record Temperatures Threaten Water Supplies
item.description: Over 40 million people in the UK are facing stringent water restrictions as a severe heatwave grips the nation, with temperatures exceeding 35°C recorded on six separate days in a single year for the ...

item.title: Prabhsimran Singh shares heartfelt thoughts on India call-up and family health
item.description: In an exclusive interview, Prabhsimran Singh reflects on his recent call-up to the Indian national team, expressing hope that this opportunity might improve his father's health. The athlete emphasizes...

item.title: The Crisis in Higher Education: Professors Grapple with Student Disengagement and AI Cheating
item.description: The article explores the growing crisis in higher education, highlighting a professor's frustration with disengaged students and the broader systemic issues within universities. It discusses how insti...

item.title: ‘Charlie and the Chocolate Factory’ Offers Engaging Family Theater Experience
item.description: The theater production of ‘Charlie and the Chocolate Factory’ has been praised for its family-friendly approach and immersive storytelling. Fred Hawson’s review highlights how the play successfully ad...

item.title: Michael Edwards exits Liverpool after fulfilling key objectives with FSG
item.description: Liverpool's top transfer strategist, Michael Edwards, has stepped down as chief football executive of Fenway Sports Group (FSG) after completing his strategic goals. The move marks the end of his seco...

item.title: Saskatchewan professor turns farm into thriving community hub
item.description: Josef Buttigieg, a biology professor from the University of Regina, initially moved to Saskatchewan in 2017 for a temporary escape from urban life. What began as a small farm investment evolved into a...

item.title: Rose Muhando Outlines Traits She Seeks in Partner After Marital Denials
item.description: Tanzanian gospel singer Rose Muhando has sparked conversations about her romantic preferences after sharing her expectations for a future partner. In a viral video from Tanzania, she emphasized wantin...

item.title: Oyo pupils and teachers freed after 56-day kidnapping ordeal
item.description: Dozens of pupils and teachers kidnapped from three schools in Oriire, Oyo State, have been safely rescued after a 56-day captivity. Security operatives, including the military, DSS, and police, succes...

item.title: Court Dismisses Bail Request for Former Accountant-General
item.description: The Appeal Court has rejected the bail request of former Accountant-General of the Federation, who is currently serving a sentence for corruption-related charges. The court ruled that the application ...

item.title: Supreme Court Dismisses Petition Without Taking Action Against Police Officer
item.description: A petitioner, Prabal Pratap, confronted the Supreme Court by throwing papers and demanding an FIR against a Lucknow police officer, claiming a syndicate operated by Duplex Technologies. The court dism...

item.title: Christopher Nolan Discusses Creative Risks and Challenges in 'The Odyssey' Adaptation
item.description: This article explores Christopher Nolan's creative process behind adapting Homer's epic 'The Odyssey' into a film, emphasizing his commitment to innovation and risk-taking. Nolan discusses how the pro...

item.title: Super Typhoon Bavi Brings Catastrophic Winds and Evacuations to East Asia
item.description: Super Typhoon Bavi, a Category 5 equivalent storm, is making landfall in the Northern Mariana Islands with winds reaching 285 km/h, prompting mass evacuations and travel suspensions across East Asia. ...

item.title: Australia's Economic Outlook: Rate Cuts, Petrol Prices, and Market Reactions
item.description: The article discusses recent developments in Australia's financial landscape, including potential early interest rate cuts by major banks, rising petrol prices, and the impact of a Telstra network out...

item.title: Hockey player transitions to writing to inspire others
item.description: The article profiles a young woman who discovered her identity and purpose through the sport of hockey but has since shifted her focus to writing as a means of inspiring others. Her journey highlights...

item.title: GOP Campaign Volunteer Resigns After Past Criminal Record Comes to Light
item.description: Andrew Havas, a volunteer for Sen. Jon Husted's campaign, resigned after his past criminal record involving a minor was revealed. The campaign accepted his resignation, citing his history of pleading ...

item.title: Cleophas Malala Addresses Accusations of Secret Ties with President Ruto
item.description: Cleophas Malala, deputy leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party, has dismissed allegations that he is secretly working with President William Ruto. In an interview with Amaica Media, Malala called ...

item.title: Catastrophic flooding hits Missouri as historic rains trigger rescue operations and widespread damage
item.description: A state of emergency has been declared in Missouri following unprecedented rainfall that triggered catastrophic flooding, submerging entire communities and forcing dramatic rescue efforts. The deluge,...
